productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteSmarten up those everyday office staples with this franco leone pair. With a tapering, pointy toed design, this pair ups the sartorial ante with it's sleek styling. Wear this with your pleated office trousers or on casual Fridays with slim-Fit tonal chinos and a casual shirt.Product DetailsBlack tapering, pointy-toed upper with central four-hole lace-ups and wingtip stitch at the toe regionPlush padding at the inner with a soft footbedTPU outsole with an upraised heel and circular nubs all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
